hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"CONDUCTOR REMINDER: In this repo, use mcp__conductor__* tools to track work — NOT TaskCreate/TaskUpdate. At the start of any multi-step task: call mcp__conductor__list_projects first. Update progress incrementally with mcp__conductor__update_task (not just at the end). Archive when done with mcp__conductor__archive_project."}}'
printf '{"systemMessage":"Conductor: Did Claude update task progress? If a multi-step task was just completed, ask Claude to call mcp__conductor__update_task and mcp__conductor__set_status."}'
